Mewtwo – A genetically engineered Pokémon with immense psychic power created from Mew’s DNA.
Lugia – The guardian of the seas that calms raging storms with its powerful wings.
Ho-Oh – A rainbow-colored phoenix said to bring eternal happiness to those who see it.
Rayquaza – The sky dragon that descends from the ozone layer to stop battles between Kyogre and Groudon.
Kyogre – The legendary titan of the oceans capable of expanding seas with massive rainstorms.
Groudon – The mighty land creator that raises continents and causes volcanic eruptions.
Dialga – The ruler of time whose heartbeat controls the flow of time itself.
Palkia – The master of space that can distort dimensions and warp reality.
Giratina – The banished ruler of the Distortion World that governs antimatter.
Zacian – A heroic wolf that wields a shining sword to protect the Galar region.
Zamazenta – The shield-bearing guardian that defends against any attack.
Arceus – The mythical creator Pokémon believed to have shaped the entire Pokémon universe.
